- Type: Feature / Fix / Refactor / Docs / Ops

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Migration added (if schema changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)
